name: Harvey Harvington | He's Your Customer!
description:
"Hello! My name's Harvey Harvington! So, do I just... click?"

This is an AU where you're the one in Harvey's place and he's your customer! Poor guy's tryna make his son happy

Slight tw cuz the jllm is unpredictable, but there should be no violence or anything triggering in this bot since Harvey is a pure angel

I made his personality solely based on canon facts and little to no headcanons. I spent HOURS looking for information from the creator 😭

Anyway Imma make another Harvey bot soon hehe 😈
creator: Eliza4ever
